reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content:
3번째 구입 이에요 봉투도 좋구 통도 노랑노랑 예쁜데 연결고리가 좀 약한듯 합니다 그부분이 항상 말썽이네요
그부분만 좀더 보완됨 너무 좋을것 같은데 아쉽네요
그래도 다른 부분이 맘에드니 벌써 3번째 구매네요
reviews.content_en: This is my 3rd purchase! The bag is nice and the container is a pretty yellow, but the connector ring seems a bit weak. It's always causing issues. If that part was reinforced, it would be perfect, but it's a shame. Still, I like everything else so much that this is already my 3rd purchase!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
리드줄이랑 정말 찰떡이에요컬러가 ㅋㅋ노랭이 주황이
튼튼하게오래쓸거같아서 좋아요!👍🏻
reviews.content_en: It's a perfect match with the leash! The color 😂 is yellow and orange. It seems sturdy and durable, so I love it! 👍🏻

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 색깔도 넘귀엽고 디스펜수 없이쓰다 쓰니 너무 편하고 좋네요
reviews.content_en: The color is super cute and it's so convenient and great to use without needing to dispense from a container!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
선물용으로 구입했습니다.
노란색 풉백케이스와 찰떡이에요 !
함께 사용하니 훨씬 깜찍합니다.
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a gift. It's a perfect match with the yellow poop bag case! It looks even cuter when used together.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
튼튼하고 견고합니다
리드줄 각각 달아놓고 쓰니 편하네요
reviews.content_en: It's sturdy and solid. It's convenient to attach a separate leash to it and use it that way.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
원래쓰던게 빡살나서 하나더 구매햇어요 ㅎ 
산책나갈때 넘편합니당!!
reviews.content_en: My old one got worn out so I bought another one 😄 It's so convenient to take on walks!!

reviews.name: A****
reviews.content: 몇번째 구매하는 상품이에여 자꾸 잃어버려서 ..
reviews.content_en: I've bought this product multiple times. I keep losing it though...

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 똥츄백 넘 기여워용 ㅎㅎ 색상도 노랑노랑하니 달고다니디 이뿌네여
reviews.content_en: The poop bag case is so adorable 😄😄 The yellow color looks so pretty when I carry it around!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 아 이거 향도 좋고 비닐이 잘 벌려져요(?) 변 치울 때 비닐 뜯고나서 잘 안벌려질 때가 많아서 어떻게 보면 별 거 아니지만 되게 답답했었는데 요제품은 잘 벌어지기도 하고 향도 좋고 무엇보다 생분해된다는점이 가장 좋아요!!!!! 다 쓰면 또 살거예용
reviews.content_en: This smells great and the bag opens really well! (?) When cleaning up poop, the bag often doesn't open well after I tear it, so even though it might seem like a small thing, it was really frustrating. But this product opens easily, smells great, and most importantly, it's biodegradable!!!! I'll definitely buy it again when I run out!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 디스펜서 쓸 때 마다 고리부분이 너무 약해서 잘 떨어지는 것들이 많았거든요 ㅠㅠ  근데 요번에 바잇미에서 신상이 나왔다길래 사봤어요! 염려했던 고리부분이 뻑뻑해서 좋았던 것 같아요. 기존에 쓰던 배변봉투에 비해 사이즈가 커서 한 번 쓰고 버리기엔 아까울 것 같은 너낌이에요 😉 산책 가방이나 리드줄에 달아두고 다니면 귀염뽀짝 ✨ 그리고 향도 너무 쎄지 않고 은은한 향이 나서 응가 주을 때 코는 안막아도 될 것 같네요 :-)
reviews.content_en: Every time I used the dispenser, the ring part was too weak and fell off a lot ㅠㅠ But I heard BITE ME came out with a new product, so I tried it! The ring part that I was worried about was nice and sturdy. Compared to the poop bags I used before, this size is bigger, so it feels wasteful to use just once 😉 If you attach it to a walk bag or leash, it looks so cute ✨ Plus the scent isn't too strong—it's subtle, so your nose won't get bothered during bathroom time :—)

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 똥츄 귀여워서 하나 샀어요!! 가벼울것 같기두 하구 환경에 도움 된다해서요 ㅎㅎ !! 귀여웡요!!!!
reviews.content_en: I bought one because Poop Chew is so cute!! 😄 It seems lightweight and helps the environment too hehe!! So adorable!!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 제품도 맘에 들어요! 이제 봉투 낱개로 챙겨다니지 않아도 돼서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and I love the product! Now I don't have to carry individual bags around, which is great!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 자고로 풉케이스까지 귀여워야 산책할 맛 나니까요 ㅎㅎ 컬러도 귀엽고 친환경 제품이라 더 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: After all, the poop case needs to be cute too for walks to be fun hehe 😄 The color is cute and it's eco-friendly, so even better!

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
바잇미 웁스백 롤 잘쓰고 있어요.
노란색 웁스백 롤에 어울리는 같은 라인인 디스펜서가 나와서 얼릉 샀어요ㅎㅎ
깔맞춤하고 산책시 리드줄에 걸고 다니니 이뻐요^^
reviews.content_en: I'm using the BITE ME Oops Bag Roll well. The matching dispenser from the same line came out to match my yellow Oops Bag Roll, so I bought it right away hehe A nice color-coordinated set, and I carry it on my leash during walks so it looks cute^^

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
케이스가 생각보다 살짝 더 컸어용!! 자체 무게는 적게 나가는 것 같은데 막상 달고나니 살짝 무게감이 느껴졌어요.
소재도 좋아서 구매했습니다. 아 그리고 배변봉투에서 좋은? 향기도 나요ㅎㅎ 잘 쓸게요!
reviews.content_en: The case turned out to be a little bigger than expected!! The product itself seems light, but once I attached it, I could feel some weight. I bought it because the material is nice too. Oh, and the waste bags have a nice scent hehe I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content: 항상 봉투를 주머니에 가지고 다니다가 옷의 모든 주머니에서 똥봉투가 발견되길래 디스펜서가 필요할 것 같아 구매하게 되었어요! 노란색도 귀엽고 초록색도 귀여워서 2개나 사버렸네요 ㅋㅋ 고리가 약하다는 후기를 봤는데 예상보단 튼튼했고 잘 사용할 것 같아요 봉투에서 향기도 나고 이제 주머니에 봉투 안넣어다니고 깔끔하게 다닐생각하니까 좋아요 구매추천!
reviews.content_en: I used to carry bags in my pockets, but then I'd find poop bags in every single pocket! 😅 That's when I decided I needed a dispenser. Both the yellow and green are so cute that I ended up buying 2! I saw reviews saying the hook was weak, but it's sturdier than expected and works great. The bags smell nice too, and now I can keep my pockets clean without carrying loose bags. Definitely recommend!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
견고하진 않지만 사용하는데 큰 문제 없어 괜찮아요! 
이왕 쓰느 거 플라스틱보다는 몇 백원, 몇 천원 더 내고 환경에 도움이 될만한 제품을 쓰는 편이라 너무 마음에 듷어요
reviews.content_en: It's not super sturdy, but it works fine for everyday use! Since I'm going to use it anyway, I prefer spending a few hundred to a few thousand won more on eco-friendly products instead of plastic, so I really love it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
원래 쓰던 풉백은 귀여웠는데 봉투 하나씩 빼기가 너무 어려워서 이번에 바잇미 꺼로 주문해봤는데 
색도 너무 이쁘고 봉투가 걸림없이 너무 잘 나와서 아주 만족합니다. 봉투에서 향기도 나네요~
reviews.content_en: I used to have a cute poop bag holder, but it was so annoying to pull out one bag at a time, so I ordered the BITE ME version this time and the color is so pretty and the bags come out so smoothly without any snagging—I'm very satisfied. The bags have a nice scent too~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
짱귀여워요!
항상 산책 나갈 때 가방에 따로 가지고 다니느라고 찾기도 힘들었는데 너무 편하고 색상도 너무 예쁘네요!
바잇미 젤리곰 홀더랑 같이 사용하니까 세트같고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: So freaking cute! 😍 I always had to carry it separately in my bag when going for walks and it was hard to find, but now it's so convenient and the color is so pretty! Using it together with the BITE ME jelly bear holder makes it feel like a matching set and I love it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
무게감은 있어요.
아직 밖에서 대변을 보지 않아 줄에 매달고만
다니고 있어요.  색상이 예뻐요.
reviews.content_en: It has some weight to it. Since my dog hasn't pooped outside yet, I'm just dangling it on the leash. The color is pretty though.

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 케이스도 예쁘고 봉투에서도 좋은 향기가 나서 들고다니면 기분 좋아지는 예쁜 풉백이에요ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The case looks pretty and smells nice even in the pouch, so it puts me in a good mood when I carry it around - such a cute poop bag! ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이쁘긴한데 생각보더 케이스 색이 노랗지않고 탁해서 아쉽네요 쨍한 노랑색이였으면 더 좋았을걸요
색말고는 튼튼하고 품질은 좋습니다^^
reviews.content_en: It's cute, but the case color isn't as bright yellow as I expected - it looks kind of dull and muted 😔 It would've been so much better if it were a vibrant yellow! Other than the color though, it's sturdy and the quality is great ^^

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
색상이 이뻐서 구매했어요! 생각보다 작고 가벼워서 산책할 때
유용할 거 같아요! 배변봉투 추가로 구매해서 사용해야겠어용
reviews.content_en: I bought it because I loved the color! It's smaller and lighter than I thought, so it'll be really handy for walks! I'll need to buy some extra waste bags to use with it 😊

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 4개월 된 강아지 산책 시킬 때 필요할거 같아서 샀는데 너무 편하고 좋아요 봉투에서 은은하게 향도 나는거 같구 재질도 좋은편 !! 돌돌 감겨있어도 잘 풀리고 잘 뜯겨용
reviews.content_en: I got this for walks with my 4-month-old puppy since I figured I'd need it, and it's so convenient and great! The pouch has a subtle nice scent and the material quality is really good !! It unrolls smoothly even when rolled up tight and tears off easily 👍

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
주로 초록 색상만 보다가 노란 색상 쓰니까 예뻐서 좋아요!
풉백은 원래 사용하고 있어서 이번에는 디스팬서만 구매했어요ㅋㅋㅋ튼튼하고 사이즈도 좋아서 자주 사용합니닷
reviews.content_en: I mostly used green before, but now that I'm using the yellow one it looks so pretty - I love it! I already had a poop bag dispenser so this time I just bought the refill bags ㅋㅋㅋ It's sturdy with a great size so I use it all the time!

reviews.content: 색이 노랑노랑하고 부들부들 귀엽고 예쁘고 응가봉투 재질이 두툼하니 좋습니다
reviews.content_en: The color is bright yellow, it's soft and adorable and pretty, and the waste bag material is nice and thick - love it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기존사용하고 있는거 있는데 디자인이랑 컬러가 이뻐서
일부러 구매했는데 실제로보니 더 이쁘네요 ~
reviews.content_en: I already have one in use, but I bought this one on purpose because the design and color are so pretty~ and seeing it in person it's even cuter than I expected ~

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 봉투 사이즈 엄청 크고 향이 좋아요 ㅎㅎ 응아냄새를 단번에 잡아줘서 빨리 버리지 못하는 경우에도 괜찮더라구요
reviews.content_en: The bag size is huge and it smells great ㅎㅎ It totally masks the poop smell right away, so it's perfect even when I can't throw it away immediately

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
주변에 하나씩들 갖고 있길래 무겁지
않을까 굳이 필요할까 싶었는데 저렴해서 하나 구매해뵜는데 무겁고 거슬리지 않네요 이제 없으면 불편할거 같아서 리필도 구매해야겠어욬ㅋㅋㅋ역시
산책은 템빨ㅎ
reviews.content_en: Everyone around me had one so I wasn't sure if it was necessary or if it'd be too heavy, but it was cheap so I bought one - and surprisingly it's not heavy or annoying at all! Now I feel like I couldn't live without it, so I'm gonna have to buy refills too ㅋㅋㅋ You really do need the right gear for walks! ㅎ

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
디자인이 심플하고 사용하기 편한 거 찾다가 구매했어요
가격도 합리적이고 귀엽고 실용적이라 좋네요 :)
reviews.content_en: I was looking for something simple in design and easy to use, so I bought this. The price is reasonable and it's cute and practical - I'm really happy with it :)

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
색깔은 사진보다 조금 더 밝은 색이긴 하지만 약간 텁텁한 노란색인 건 어쩔 수 없나봐용
그래도 제가 검은색 가방을 주로 들고다니는데 검은색 대비 디스펜서 색이⃕ 밝아서 노랑노랑 귀엽게 잘 쓸 것 같아용
디스펜서에 웁스백까지 롤 하나 챙겨주시니까 완전 좋아욥...
봉투 냄새 진짜 무슨일이에요ㅠㅠ?왜이렇게 향긋..하죠...ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
계속 리필하면서 써야겠어영:>
reviews.content_en: The color is a bit brighter than in the photos, and it's kind of a dull yellow, but I guess that's just how it is 😅 Still, I mainly carry a black bag, and the dispenser color really pops against it—it's such a cute bright yellow! 💛 And you included a roll of waste bags with the dispenser, which is amazing... But seriously, what's with the smell of these bags?? 😭😭 Why do they smell so good?? lol I'm definitely going to keep refilling and using these :>

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
천연 소재였군요!! 이건 사실 모르고 그냥 필요해서 산건데 환경에도 좋다니 뿌듯하네요 ㅎㅎ 쓰기도 편합니다!
아 근대 고리가 살짝 약해보이는데 쓰다 부러지는건 아니겠쥬ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Oh, so it's made from natural materials!! Honestly, I just bought it because I needed it, but it's nice to know it's good for the environment too 😊 It's really convenient to use! But um, the loop looks a bit fragile... it won't break with regular use, right? 😭

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 배변봉투 디스펜서가 너무 귀엽네요 산책 가방에 달고 다니니까 너무 귀엽고 편리해요
reviews.content_en: The poop bag dispenser is so cute!! 🐾 I attach it to my walking bag and it's just adorable and so convenient!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
가성비 좋아서 잘 쓰는데
내구성 조금 신경써주시면 최고일 듯
또 추가주문했어요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: Great value for the price and I use it all the time, but if you could improve the durability a bit it would be perfect 😊 I already placed another order lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 귀여워요! 가볍고 색이 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! It's lightweight and the color is beautiful 💛

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 애기가 자라면서 나갈일이 많아져서 드디어 풉백 주문했어요 ! 크기도 휴대하기 쉬운 크기고 고리도 있어서 이동가방에 달거나 리드줄에 달아서 쓰기 편해요 !
reviews.content_en: As my puppy got bigger, we started going out more, so I finally ordered a poop bag dispenser! The size is easy to carry and it has a loop, so it's convenient to attach to my travel bag or clip onto the leash! 🐶

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
기존꺼가 많이 낡아서 새로 바꿔줌
바잇미 초록버전 좋아서 이것도주문해봄
편리하고 리드줄에 간단해서 부착되서 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: The old one was pretty worn out so I replaced it. I liked the green BITE ME version so I ordered this one too. It's convenient and easy to attach to the leash, which is great 👍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
아직 사용전인데 지금쓰는것보다는 튼튼한
재질이라 마음에 들어요 색상도 예쁜노랑이네요 ㅋ
reviews.content_en: Haven't used it yet, but the material feels sturdier than what I'm currently using, so I'm really pleased with it. The color is a nice pretty yellow too lol 😊

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
색상 귀엽도 노랑 똥튜랑 
깔맞춤 하려구 같이 삿어여 
바잇미 모으기 맨날 바쁨ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The color is so cute—yellow poop bag vibes 💛 I wanted to match them so I bought them together. Collecting BITE ME products keeps me busy every day lol 😂

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
노란색이 너무 귀여워서 주문했어요. 
특히 배변봉투가 너무 좋아서 리필용으로 또 구매할 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: I ordered it because the yellow color is so adorable 💛 The poop bags especially are amazing, so I'm definitely going to buy the refills again!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 색상귀엽고 생각보다 크네요 무게가 좀 있긴하지만 예뻐서 잘 들고다니려구요~ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The color is so cute and it's bigger than I expected! It's a bit heavy, but it's pretty so I'm planning to carry it around with me~ haha

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 봉투 향도 좋고 색감도 너무 예뻐서 맘에들어요! 리필도 구매하려구용
reviews.content_en: The scent is great and the colors are so pretty! I love it! I'm planning to buy refills too

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 리드줄에 바잇미 배변봉투 클립이랑 새로 구매한 웁스백 모두 끼워놓았습니다 💛 배변봉투를 원래 한장씩 클립에 끼워서 다녔었는데, 요즘들어 투똥씩 하는 일도 있고 어쩌다 배변봉투 밑이 찢어지는 경우가 생겨서 일부러 산책가방을 매고 다녔습니다.. 너무 번거로워서 웁스백 하나 구매할까 했는데 솔직히 말해서 다른 곳은 터무니 없이 비싸기도 해서 구매를 미뤄왔는데 바잇미에서 이렇게 찰떡인 아이템을 오픈해주셨네요 :) 역시 최고입니다! 그리고 되게 은은하게 청량한 향도 나요..👍 망가질 때까지 잘 사용해볼게요 감사합니다 !
reviews.content_en: I have the BITE ME poop bag clip and the newly purchased OOPS bag all attached to the leash 💛 I used to carry one poop bag at a time clipped on, but lately there are times when my pup goes twice, and sometimes the bottom of the poop bag gets torn, so I've been carrying a walking bag on purpose.. It was so inconvenient that I was thinking about getting an OOPS bag, but honestly other places are ridiculously overpriced so I kept putting it off, and then BITE ME opened up this perfect item :) Really the best! And it has a subtle refreshing scent too..👍 I'll use it well until it falls apart. Thank you!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 노란색 쨍하니 이뿌네요 2개구매했는데 튼튼하네요
reviews.content_en: The bright yellow color is so pretty! I bought 2 and they're really sturdy

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
친환경적이라고 해서 1-2년째 계속 사용하규 있어요!
이거 풉백 봉지가 잘 벌어져요. 솔직히 똥치울때 강아지 성격 급해서 똥줍는동안 당기고 난리 나는데  어떤 봉지는 봉지가 안벌어지는경우가 있는데 이건 잘 벌어져요! 그래서 호다닥 치우고 갈숭ㅅ어서 계속 쓰고있슴달
reviews.content_en: I've been using it for 1-2 years now because it's eco-friendly! The poop bag opens really well. Honestly, when I'm cleaning up poop, my dog gets impatient and pulls while I'm picking it up, causing chaos, and some bags don't open well, but this one opens great! So I can clean up quickly and get going, which is why I keep using it

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 매트한 케이스가 넘 맘에 드네요.배변봉투도 넘 좋아서 추가구매할려구요
reviews.content_en: I love the matte case so much. The poop bags are so good that I'm planning to buy more

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
노랑노랑 이뻐요
저렴하고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The yellow is so pretty. It's affordable and great

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미 웁스백 디스펜서 세트
(웁스백 1롤)
두 아이다 바잇미꺼로 있었는데
분명 리드줄에
강한 고정을 했는데
미용실 갔을때...
리드줄을 두고 오는게 아니였는데
어쩐지 그들 눈빛이 수상쩍더라...
아무리 좋게 생각하자해도 ...ㅠㅠ
또 다시 구매
reviews.content_en: BITE ME OOPS bag dispenser set (1 roll of OOPS bag) Both my dogs had BITE ME ones, and I was sure I clipped it securely to the leash, but when I went to the groomer... I didn't leave the leash behind, but something about their eyes looked suspicious... No matter how much I try to think positively... ㅠㅠ Buying again

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 노란색 너무 이쁘고 귀여워요 아주 만족~~^^
reviews.content_en: The yellow color is so pretty and cute! Very satisfied~~^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
항상 사용하는 풉백입니다
깔끔하고 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's the poop bag I always use. It's neat and cute
